ddls:
CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the partner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the partner */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the partner (e.g., End-User, Distributor) */,
  "partner_owner_id" TEXT /* ID of the partner owner */,
  "shipping_poc_id" TEXT /* ID of the shipping point of contact */,
  "technical_poc_id" TEXT /* ID of the technical point of contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Partner's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Partner's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Partner's state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Partner's country */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Partner's postal code */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Partner's phone number */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Partner's fax number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Partner's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partners_shipping_poc_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_poc_id") REFERENCES shipping_pocs ("poc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partners_technical_poc_id FOREIGN KEY ("technical_poc_id") REFERENCES technical_pocs ("poc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partners_partner_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_owner_id") REFERENCES partner_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partner_owners" (
  "owner_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each partner owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the partner owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the partner owner */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the partner owner */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the partner owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_pocs" (
  "poc_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each shipping point of contact */,
  "poc_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping point of contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the shipping point of contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the shipping point of contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the shipping point of contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the shipping point of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_pocs" (
  "poc_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each technical point of contact */,
  "poc_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical point of contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technical point of contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technical point of contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the technical point of contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the technical point of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partner_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "partner_id" TEXT /* ID of the partner involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., meeting, email, phone call) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the interaction record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partner_interactions_interaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partner_interactions_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES partners ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., meeting, email, phone call) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partner_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner category (e.g., End-User, Distributor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the partner category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., partner activity, sales) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., partner activity, sales) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partner_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "partner_id" TEXT /* ID of the partner */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., sales, revenue) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the performance record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partner_performance_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES partners ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
